summary: High‑quality soundboard upgrade captures a hot second set highlighted by China Cat > Rider and a fierce Samson, with only minor mix hiccups.
review: The Miller‑mastered SBD source sounds crisp and benefits from pitch‑correction, though there’s a brief moment where Jerry disappears from the mix. Musically the show shines in the second set – China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider, Playing in the Band, Samson and Franklin’s Tower are praised as standout moments, while Sugar Magnolia and U.S. Blues fall flat.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews are overwhelmingly positive about the performance (70% weight) with a few minor recording mix issues (30% weight), yielding an overall rating in the high‑four range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Pitch‑corrected Miller SBD upgrade is clear and balanced; a brief mix glitch mutes Jerry on Mississippi Half‑Step, but overall the sound is crisp with corrected track issues.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is described as average, while the second set is hotter and more cohesive, making this concert one of the tour’s top‑five shows.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Mix issue mutes him briefly on Mississippi Half‑Step; otherwise his guitar work is praised for relentless energy and strong leads on China Cat and Samson.
band_member_comments.Phil: His bass provides an “X‑factor” journeyscape during Playing in the Band, comparable to the 11/1 show vibe.
band_member_comments.Drums: The 1979‑style drum segment is highlighted as great.
